root_text.sn35.102:1.2: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.102:1.6: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.102:1.9: Te vo pahīnā hitāya sukhāya bhavissanti.
root_text.sn35.102:1.12: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.102:1.15: So vo pahīno hitāya sukhāya bhavissati …pe…
root_text.sn35.102:1.16: yampidaṁ manosamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tampi na tumhākaṁ.
root_text.sn35.102:1.18: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissati.
root_text.sn35.102:1.19: Yampi, bhikkhave, na tumhākaṁ, taṁ pajahatha.
root_text.sn35.102:1.20: Taṁ vo pahīnaṁ hitāya sukhāya bhavissatī”ti.

translation_text.sn35.102:1.2: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.102:1.4: The eye isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.102:1.6: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.102:1.16: The pleasant, painful, or neutral feeling that arises dependent on mind contact isn’t yours: give it up.
translation_text.sn35.102:1.18: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.
translation_text.sn35.102:1.20: Giving it up will be for your welfare and happiness.”
